# Helium flux
# LHAASO, Precise Measurement of the Cosmic Ray Helium Spectrum above 0.1 PeV, 2025 (arXiv:2511.05013)
# Columns: [0] log10(Emin/PeV) [1] log10(Emax/PeV) [2,3,4] flux stat syst (QGSJET-II-04) [5,6,7] flux stat syst (EPOS-LHC) [8,9,10] flux stat syst (SIBYLL-2.3d)
# Units of flux PeV^-1 m^-2 s^-1 sr^-1
